title: Whimscape x EMI
description: An (unofficial) add-on pack that brings Whimscape's GUI style to EMI.
body:
Replaces [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)'s GUI with textures in the style of [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape). This is an unofficial add-on pack. If you have any suggestions or issues please reach out to me on Discord: @FaultyFunctions

## How it looks

![A stylish GUI for the EMI mod. A list of Minecraft items fills the right third of the screen. In the center is an interface that shows various crafting recipes for how to make a leather helmet. The left third is blank, apart from various small buttons from the EMI mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6ZgKt92U/images/2f62bc2e81e52b4e2513c3bb1dae9dff0242d293.png)

## Credits
Obviously thanks to [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape) for making such a stylish pack. This add-on pack is basically me converting their JEI textures to be used with EMI instead. While you *technically* don't need Whimscape to use this, the textures would be totally out of place without the base Whimscape pack.
